summary: Point live search at the Business Information chains search endpoint.
reason: Greptile review found the search command calling chains:search through the Account Management base URL with q instead of the Business Information host with chainName, causing live/default auto search to fail before local fallback could help.
validated_outcome: go test ./internal/cli -run TestSearchLiveUsesBusinessInformationChainsEndpoint -count=1 passed after first reproducing the wrong host/query failure.
